_comment: Deterministic E2E dataset consumed by scripts/seed-e2e.mjs. Seeded into the admin tenant (admin@opendefender.io). Idempotent by title/CVE. Impact scale 0-10, probability 0-1 (Score Engine bounds).

risks.title: [E2E] Unpatched web framework on public server
risks.description: Public web server runs an outdated framework with known CVEs.

risks.title: [E2E] Publicly readable S3 backup bucket
risks.description: S3 bucket with public read access storing production backups.

risks.title: [E2E] Weak password policy on admin portal
risks.description: Admin portal accepts 6-character passwords with no MFA.

risks.title: [E2E] Missing encryption at rest on customer DB
risks.description: Customer database stores PII without at-rest encryption.

risks.title: [E2E] No offsite backup for core banking ledger
risks.description: Core ledger has no tested offsite backup.

risks.title: [E2E] Shared privileged credentials among ops team
risks.description: Ops team shares a single root credential.

risks.title: [E2E] Unmonitored third-party payment integration
risks.description: Payment partner integration has no monitoring or alerting.

risks.title: [E2E] Legacy VPN appliance past end-of-life
risks.description: Remote-access VPN appliance is EOL and unpatched.

risks.title: [E2E] No incident response runbook
risks.description: No documented, tested incident response procedure.

risks.title: [E2E] Phishing exposure — no email filtering
risks.description: Inbound email has no anti-phishing filtering.

risks.title: [E2E] Unsegmented flat production network
risks.description: Production network is flat with no segmentation.

risks.title: [E2E] Insufficient logging for regulatory audit
risks.description: Systems lack the retained logs a COBAC audit requires.

incident.title: [E2E] Suspicious login burst on admin portal
incident.description: Multiple failed admin logins from an unusual geography.
